provisions.title: Citation, commencement and interpretation
provisions.content: (1). These Regulations may be cited as the Companies (Private Companies) (Audit Exemption) Regulations, 2004, and shall come into force on such date as the Minister may by notice in the Gazette , appoint. (2). In these Regulations “the Act” means the Companies Act, 2002. [ Act No. 12 of 2002 ]

provisions.title: Qualifying conditions
provisions.content: For the purposes of the qualifying conditions in subsections (2) and (8) of section 171 of the Act— (a) the relevant figure for “turnover” shall be the same figure as prescribed in Income Tax Act, 1973 as being the threshold for the exemption from the requirement that a return of income be prepared by a Certified Public Accountant; (b) the relevant figure for “gross assets” shall be 50% of the figure specified in paragraph (a) .
